description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a fit build, standing upright. She is dressed in a sleeveless, form-fitting top with a deep V-neck, paired with a short skirt and long gloves that extend above the elbows. Her footwear consists of knee-high boots, and she wears no visible accessories or carried items. Her hair is styled in a long, straight ponytail with some loose strands framing her face. The clothing has a sleek, slightly glossy finish, especially on the top, which appears to be made of a synthetic or semi-reflective material. The overall appearance is modern and urban, suitable for a city or street environment.
description: A standing adult female pedestrian in a modern, sleeveless top, short skirt, long gloves, and knee-high boots, with a long ponytail hairstyle. The outfit is sleek and slightly glossy, giving a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the form-fitting top, skirt, and the length of the gloves and boots.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the deep V-neck of the top, symmetrical gloves, and the overall stance with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile and the same clothing details.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back of the top, the straight ponytail, and the fit of the skirt and boots from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top with deep V-neck, short skirt, long gloves, and knee-high boots
attribute_hairstyle: long straight ponytail with loose front strands
